_readme: Copy this file to config/local-config.json (gitignored) and fill in your values.
azure.clientSecret is read ONLY by the local host from that file; it is never exposed over HTTP.
cribl.leaderUrl: on-prem leader base URL (https://host:9000) or a Cribl.Cloud workspace URL.
cribl.authToken: a static bearer token - an on-prem login token or a Cribl.Cloud token (static per the Phase 1 roadmap; no login flow yet).
cribl.rejectUnauthorized: set false ONLY for self-signed on-prem leader certificates; applies to leader calls only.
port: the loopback port the host listens on (http://127.0.0.1:{port}).
